name: EBV_LMP1_LMP2_oncogene
description: EBV latent membrane proteins LMP1 (BNLF1) and LMP2A/LMP2B encoded at the right end of the genome adjacent to the right TR. LMP1 is the principal viral oncogene — a constitutive CD40 mimic that activates NF-kB, JNK, PI3K/AKT; required for B-cell transformation in vitro. LMP2A provides a tonic BCR-mimicking signal via its ITAM. LMP1 and LMP2 mRNAs span the TR-internal junction in circularized episomes, making split-read detection across the TR a marker for episome circularity.
